languages.text: {n}Сержант несколько секунд переминается с ноги на ногу в неловких попытках уйти от ответа.{/n} "Я, Ваше Благородие, человек маленький. В штрафники угодил по нелепой случайности — хотел себе улучшить жизнь, вот и взялся приторговывать разным мусором с {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}мануфакторума{/g}. Оказалось, что мусор этот вовсе не мусор, а очень даже ценное сырье. Так в тридцать втором и очутился. Руки-то, может, и впрямь ловкие, да что толку с них".

traits.locale_text: {n}Сержант несколько секунд переминается с ноги на ногу в неловких попытках уйти от ответа.{/n} "Я, Ваше Благородие, человек маленький. В штрафники угодил по нелепой случайности — хотел себе улучшить жизнь, вот и взялся приторговывать разным мусором с {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}мануфакторума{/g}. Оказалось, что мусор этот вовсе не мусор, а очень даже ценное сырье. Так в тридцать втором и очутился. Руки-то, может, и впрямь ловкие, да что толку с них".

languages.text: {n}For a few seconds, the sergeant shifts awkwardly from foot to foot, reluctant to answer.{/n} "I'm no one special, my {mf|lord|lady}. I landed myself in the penal legion because of a streak of bad luck — I wanted to do better for myself, so I started peddling rubbish from the {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}manufactorum{/g}. Turned out that it wasn't rubbish at all, but actually highly valuable materials. That's how I wound up in the 32nd. So what if I have nimble fingers, what good's it done me?"
languages.original_text: {n}Сержант несколько секунд переминается с ноги на ногу в неловких попытках уйти от ответа.{/n} "Я, Ваше Благородие, человек маленький. В штрафники угодил по нелепой случайности — хотел себе улучшить жизнь, вот и взялся приторговывать разным мусором с {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}мануфакторума{/g}. Оказалось, что мусор этот вовсе не мусор, а очень даже ценное сырье. Так в тридцать втором и очутился. Руки-то, может, и впрямь ловкие, да что толку с них".

I landed myself in the penal legion because of a streak of bad luck — I wanted to do better for myself, so I started peddling rubbish from the manufactorum. Turned out that it wasn't rubbish at all, but actually highly valuable materials. That's how I wound up in the 32nd. So what if I have nimble fingers, what good's it done me?"

{n}For a few seconds, the sergeant shifts awkwardly from foot to foot, reluctant to answer.{/n} "I'm no one special, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I landed myself in the penal legion because of a streak of bad luck — I wanted to do better for myself, so I started peddling rubbish from the manufactorum. Turned out that it wasn't rubbish at all, but actually highly valuable materials. That's how I wound up in the 32nd. So what if I have nimble fingers, what good's it done me?"

{n}For a few seconds, the sergeant shifts awkwardly from foot to foot, reluctant to answer.{/n} "I'm no one special, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I landed myself in the penal legion because of a streak of bad luck — I wanted to do better for myself, so I started peddling rubbish from the manufactorum. Turned out that it wasn't rubbish at all, but actually highly valuable materials. That's how I wound up in the 32nd. So what if I have nimble fingers, what good's it done me?"

languages.text: {n}Durante unos segundos, el sargento se pasa el peso de una pierna a otra, resistiéndose a responder.{/n} «No tengo ningún don, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Acabé en la legión penal por una serie de desgracias: quería vivir mejor, así que empecé a vender la basura del {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}manufactorum{/g}. Resultó que no era basura, sino un conjunto de materiales muy valiosos. Así fue como terminé en el 32.º. ¿De qué me sirve tener dedos ágiles? ¿Qué he ganado con ellos?».
languages.original_text: {n}For a few seconds, the sergeant shifts awkwardly from foot to foot, reluctant to answer.{/n} "I'm no one special, my {mf|lord|lady}. I landed myself in the penal legion because of a streak of bad luck — I wanted to do better for myself, so I started peddling rubbish from the {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}manufactorum{/g}. Turned out that it wasn't rubbish at all, but actually highly valuable materials. That's how I wound up in the 32nd. So what if I have nimble fingers, what good's it done me?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Durante unos segundos, el sargento se pasa el peso de una pierna a otra, resistiéndose a responder.{/n} «No tengo ningún don, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Acabé en la legión penal por una serie de desgracias: quería vivir mejor, así que empecé a vender la basura del {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}manufactorum{/g}. Resultó que no era basura, sino un conjunto de materiales muy valiosos. Así fue como terminé en el 32.º. ¿De qué me sirve tener dedos ágiles? ¿Qué he ganado con ellos?».

languages.text: {n}有那么几秒钟，军士局促地挪了挪脚，不太愿意开口。{/n}“我没有什么特别之处，大人。我就是走了霉运才进的判罪军团。我想让自己的日子好过点，所以就开始倒腾{g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}制造工厂{/g}里的废料。结果那些根本不是废料，而是非常值钱的材料。就这么着，我进了第32团。手巧又怎样？还不是落得这个下场。”
languages.original_text: {n}For a few seconds, the sergeant shifts awkwardly from foot to foot, reluctant to answer.{/n} "I'm no one special, my {mf|lord|lady}. I landed myself in the penal legion because of a streak of bad luck — I wanted to do better for myself, so I started peddling rubbish from the {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}manufactorum{/g}. Turned out that it wasn't rubbish at all, but actually highly valuable materials. That's how I wound up in the 32nd. So what if I have nimble fingers, what good's it done me?"

traits.locale_text: {n}有那么几秒钟，军士局促地挪了挪脚，不太愿意开口。{/n}“我没有什么特别之处，大人。我就是走了霉运才进的判罪军团。我想让自己的日子好过点，所以就开始倒腾{g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}制造工厂{/g}里的废料。结果那些根本不是废料，而是非常值钱的材料。就这么着，我进了第32团。手巧又怎样？还不是落得这个下场。”

languages.text: {n}L'espace de quelques instants, le sergent embarrassé danse d'un pied sur l'autre, réticent à répondre à votre question.{/n} « Je suis un type tout ce qu'il y a de plus ordinaire, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}. Je me suis retrouvé dans la Légion Pénale à la suite d'un malheureux concours de circonstances... Je m'étais mis à vendre des cochonneries provenant du {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}manufactorum{/g} dans l'espoir d'améliorer ma condition. Sauf qu'en fait de cochonneries, il s'agissait de matériel très précieux. Résultat, j'ai atterri dans le 32e régiment. Alors, je suis peut-être agile de mes dix doigts, mais voyez plutôt où ça m'a mené... »
languages.original_text: {n}For a few seconds, the sergeant shifts awkwardly from foot to foot, reluctant to answer.{/n} "I'm no one special, my {mf|lord|lady}. I landed myself in the penal legion because of a streak of bad luck — I wanted to do better for myself, so I started peddling rubbish from the {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}manufactorum{/g}. Turned out that it wasn't rubbish at all, but actually highly valuable materials. That's how I wound up in the 32nd. So what if I have nimble fingers, what good's it done me?"

traits.locale_text: {n}L'espace de quelques instants, le sergent embarrassé danse d'un pied sur l'autre, réticent à répondre à votre question.{/n} « Je suis un type tout ce qu'il y a de plus ordinaire, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}. Je me suis retrouvé dans la Légion Pénale à la suite d'un malheureux concours de circonstances... Je m'étais mis à vendre des cochonneries provenant du {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}manufactorum{/g} dans l'espoir d'améliorer ma condition. Sauf qu'en fait de cochonneries, il s'agissait de matériel très précieux. Résultat, j'ai atterri dans le 32e régiment. Alors, je suis peut-être agile de mes dix doigts, mais voyez plutôt où ça m'a mené... »

languages.text: {n}Birkaç saniyeliğine çavuş, cevap vermeye isteksiz bir şekilde huzursuzca bir ayaktan diğerine ağırlığını veriyor.{/n} "Ben özel biri değilim {mf|lordum|leydim}. Kötü şans silsilesi yüzünden ceza infaz lejyonuna düştüm. Kendim için daha iyisini istiyordum, bu yüzden {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}manufaktorumdan{/g} çer çöp satmaya başladım. Meğer onlar hiç de çer çöp değilmiş, oldukça değerli malzemelermiş. 32. Alay'a işte böyle düştüm. Yani çevik parmaklarım varsa ne olmuş, bana ne faydası dokundu ki?"
languages.original_text: {n}For a few seconds, the sergeant shifts awkwardly from foot to foot, reluctant to answer.{/n} "I'm no one special, my {mf|lord|lady}. I landed myself in the penal legion because of a streak of bad luck — I wanted to do better for myself, so I started peddling rubbish from the {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}manufactorum{/g}. Turned out that it wasn't rubbish at all, but actually highly valuable materials. That's how I wound up in the 32nd. So what if I have nimble fingers, what good's it done me?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Birkaç saniyeliğine çavuş, cevap vermeye isteksiz bir şekilde huzursuzca bir ayaktan diğerine ağırlığını veriyor.{/n} "Ben özel biri değilim {mf|lordum|leydim}. Kötü şans silsilesi yüzünden ceza infaz lejyonuna düştüm. Kendim için daha iyisini istiyordum, bu yüzden {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}manufaktorumdan{/g} çer çöp satmaya başladım. Meğer onlar hiç de çer çöp değilmiş, oldukça değerli malzemelermiş. 32. Alay'a işte böyle düştüm. Yani çevik parmaklarım varsa ne olmuş, bana ne faydası dokundu ki?"

languages.text: {n}Der Sergeant tritt einigen Sekunden lang von einem Fuß auf den anderen, ehe er zögernd antwortet.{/n} "Ich bin nicht besonders, {mf|Mylord|Mylady}. Ich bin nach einer Pechsträhne in der Straflegion gelandet ... ich wollte ein besseres Leben, also fing ich an, Abfälle aus dem {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}Manufactorum{/g} zu verticken. Wie sich herausstellte, waren das aber keine Abfälle, sondern extrem wertvolle Materialien. So kam ich zum 32. Was haben mir meine flinken Finger also gebracht?"
languages.original_text: {n}For a few seconds, the sergeant shifts awkwardly from foot to foot, reluctant to answer.{/n} "I'm no one special, my {mf|lord|lady}. I landed myself in the penal legion because of a streak of bad luck — I wanted to do better for myself, so I started peddling rubbish from the {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}manufactorum{/g}. Turned out that it wasn't rubbish at all, but actually highly valuable materials. That's how I wound up in the 32nd. So what if I have nimble fingers, what good's it done me?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Sergeant tritt einigen Sekunden lang von einem Fuß auf den anderen, ehe er zögernd antwortet.{/n} "Ich bin nicht besonders, {mf|Mylord|Mylady}. Ich bin nach einer Pechsträhne in der Straflegion gelandet ... ich wollte ein besseres Leben, also fing ich an, Abfälle aus dem {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}Manufactorum{/g} zu verticken. Wie sich herausstellte, waren das aber keine Abfälle, sondern extrem wertvolle Materialien. So kam ich zum 32. Was haben mir meine flinken Finger also gebracht?"

languages.text: {n}数秒のあいだ、軍曹は答えるのをためらい、ぎこちなく足を踏み替える。{/n}「私は特別な者ではありません、{mf|閣下|閣下}。不運続きでペナル・レギオンに落ちました。少しでも暮らし向きを良くしようと、{g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}製造廠{/g}のがらくたを売りさばき始めたのです。ところがそれは、がらくたどころか、実に貴重な資材だった。そうして私は第三十二連隊送りになったというわけで。器用な指を持っていたところで、何の役に立ったというのでしょう。」
languages.original_text: {n}For a few seconds, the sergeant shifts awkwardly from foot to foot, reluctant to answer.{/n} "I'm no one special, my {mf|lord|lady}. I landed myself in the penal legion because of a streak of bad luck — I wanted to do better for myself, so I started peddling rubbish from the {g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}manufactorum{/g}. Turned out that it wasn't rubbish at all, but actually highly valuable materials. That's how I wound up in the 32nd. So what if I have nimble fingers, what good's it done me?"

traits.locale_text: {n}数秒のあいだ、軍曹は答えるのをためらい、ぎこちなく足を踏み替える。{/n}「私は特別な者ではありません、{mf|閣下|閣下}。不運続きでペナル・レギオンに落ちました。少しでも暮らし向きを良くしようと、{g|Encyclopedia:Manufactorum}製造廠{/g}のがらくたを売りさばき始めたのです。ところがそれは、がらくたどころか、実に貴重な資材だった。そうして私は第三十二連隊送りになったというわけで。器用な指を持っていたところで、何の役に立ったというのでしょう。」
